title: University of Pennsylvania
caption: Some say we fell in love during this photoshoot... it was definitely the start of something!

title: Brown Family Weekend
caption: When we cosplayed as Sofie's parents. What a foreshadowing.

title: Punta Fuego Beach House
caption: Fuego has always been there for as long as we've been together. This Fuego trip was especially cathartic.

title: Pacific Palisades
caption: First hand witnessing your love for sugarfish. RIP Palisades 🥲

title: Sorsogon
caption: The most unprompted and beautiful trip. Fireflies, couples massages (with your dad), and a rock sanctuary.

title: Ma. Launch Event
caption: When Ma. came to life. So proud of you 💕

title: IPD Graduation
caption: Bianca earns her Master's Degree!! Philly round 2. Our first cohabitation experiment (and thus when I was set on marrying you).

title: Pause Cafe
caption: Our home in New York where we became regulars. Where we really grew up as people, both individually and as a couple. A New York minute I'm so thankful to have lived with you.

title: Patrick & Dooby Joint Bday
caption: Our first friends' trip not to the Philippines!! A weekend where our Lynbrook + wags squad was solidified!

title: Crypto Miami
caption: From mega mansions to mega yachts, the perfect work offsite when you work with your best friends.

title: Mango Deck
caption: Cabo round 1 and our first trip together with Ryan!

title: Disneyland
caption: Including this because you've somehow forgotten our Disneyland experience...

title: Miaoli
caption: When you met my grandparents and I got to take you around my home country 🥹

title: Donum
caption: Another special place that encapsulates our SF love story. Can't wait to display our coffee table books soon!

title: SF Pinoy Tahoe Trip
caption: The canon event when the SF Pinoys became our closest Filipino friends. We've come a long way from the car ride with Paolo and Paco thinking I'm some Brent kid.

title: 440 Webster Mitsuri Themed Birthday
caption: Our forever SF home. Also when you were an extreme Mitsuri weeb and my attempt at Sugarfish.

title: Lago Algo
caption: A crazy trip between Andres, Gaby, Ashley, and even some Adrienne. But Lago Algo will forever live in our hearts.

title: Post Ranch
caption: If I had a ring I would've proposed right here. One of the most beautiful views I've ever seen.

title: Balesin Banyan Tree
caption: When we got to take my family to Balesin. Banyan tree of life!!

title: Omotesando
caption: My first trip with your family 🥹 Is this the photo evidence that I showed stores to find your Cinnamon Roll bag I dropped? Yessir but that made it even more memorable!

title: Salt Lake City
caption: Another extremely random trip that I hardly have any memory of, but certainly a step in your journey to shredding.

title: Monterrey
caption: Pebble Beach with the Ongs and Ninang Carmen joking I should propose here (2 weeks before I actually proposed).

title: Manjuyod Sand Bar
caption: Somewhere in between peak crashout (Cebu Pac you are terrible) and pure proposal ecstasy. I'll never forget this little stop where I shaved in the bathroom.

title: Setsu Honeymoon
caption: The first time we're able to vacation together officially!! With permission to stay in Setsu! Pure bliss of a week.

title: Alamo Park
caption: A goodbye to our time in SF but really it was au revoir -- until we meet again.

title: Setúbal
caption: Our first eurotrip, starting with Bridget's wedding! Despite the 100 degrees and Philippine's Barron Trump cramping our style, I look back at Portugal fondly (even if it's a dying city).

title: City Tour Bus
caption: Our first HOP ON HOP OFF experience!!! With a city tours boat tour to cap it off! Losing my DJI hurt but I'm so glad to see the Sagrada, Guadi's other works, and OG Loewe.

title: Margo
caption: Too many highlights in Copenhagen but our Italian birthday dinner across our hotel was pure happiness.

title: Upper House
caption: Still the top, top hotel experience for me ever. A short trip but thank you for showing me Hong Kong.

title: Newton Food Centre
caption: Our last international trip before I enlisted for the AI war. I thought I really got to bond with Lolo and Lola here ❤️

title: Placeholder: a secret in Sydney
caption: Placeholder caption — the secret story behind this one.

caption: A new adventure is brewing.
